title: France suffers major power outage as Europe sizzles in record-breaking heat
summary_full: A heat-related power outage left around 68,000 homes without electricity in western France as record-breaking heat sweeps Europe.
summary_public: A heat-related power outage left around 68,000 homes without electricity in western France as record-breaking heat sweeps Europe.
